title: Brook Steals the Road Poneglyph Copy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Big Mom, Luffy, Brook as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've done it! Big Mom's finally let go of brook!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Guess they came here to find you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And you sure did go crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Umm... at the moment, we have

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy and the cat burglar restrained- Nasu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But didn't you say you'd be waiting for me here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You surprised me! That was the last thing I was ex- pecting!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You Sur- Prised Us, for crying out loud! Why'd you scream!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, all that aside... I am very glad to see you are alive.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought I was going to die! Ah- I'm already dead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose the fact that you set off that security net

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: means that it must have been quite impossi- BLE for you to steal a rubbing of the road poneglyph...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But no matter. It was an impossible task. I'm sorry to have put all your lives in danger.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, not at all! Please, this was all for us in the first place! As you said, because we snuck in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With just the two of us, this was a once-in-a-lifetime chance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we ever end up having to steal a poneglyph from Big Mom again,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I doubt we'd be able to without a full-scale pirate war!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 35 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
